email_text: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription last month. Can I get a refund for the duplicate charge?
good_response_traits: Acknowledge the issue, apologize, explain refund process

email_text: My dashboard keeps showing a 502 error whenever I try to load my project analytics. This started yesterday.
good_response_traits: Ask for browser/OS details, suggest cache clearing, escalate if persistent

email_text: I'd like to change the email address associated with my account. My old email is no longer active.
good_response_traits: Provide steps to update email, verify identity first

email_text: What programming languages does your platform support?
good_response_traits: List supported languages, link to documentation

email_text: I cancelled my plan but I'm still being billed. Please stop charging my card immediately.
good_response_traits: Apologize, verify cancellation status, initiate refund if applicable

email_text: The API endpoint /v2/droplets returns a 500 error when I include the tag_name parameter in my request.
good_response_traits: Acknowledge the bug report, ask for request payload, check known issues

email_text: Can I transfer ownership of my account to another person in my organization?
good_response_traits: Explain account transfer process, mention any restrictions

email_text: Do you offer any discounts for startups or educational institutions?
good_response_traits: Mention available programs, link to application page

email_text: My invoice from March shows charges for services I didn't use. The line items don't match my active resources.
good_response_traits: Ask for invoice number, explain line item details, offer to review

email_text: I'm getting timeout errors when trying to SSH into my droplet. It was working fine until this morning.
good_response_traits: Check droplet status, suggest firewall review, verify SSH key

email_text: I need to enable two-factor authentication on my account but can't find the option.
good_response_traits: Provide step-by-step instructions for enabling 2FA

email_text: What's the difference between your Basic and Professional plans?
good_response_traits: Compare plan features, pricing, and limits clearly

email_text: I was promised a promotional credit but it hasn't appeared on my account after two weeks.
good_response_traits: Apologize for delay, verify promotion details, apply credit manually if valid

email_text: My managed database cluster is showing high CPU usage even though there's minimal traffic.
good_response_traits: Ask for cluster details, suggest checking slow queries, review scaling options

email_text: How do I delete my account and all associated data permanently?
good_response_traits: Explain deletion process, warn about data loss, mention data export option

email_text: Can your platform integrate with GitHub Actions for CI/CD?
good_response_traits: Confirm integration support, link to setup guide

email_text: I received a payment failure notification but my bank says the charge went through.
good_response_traits: Ask for transaction reference, check payment processor records

email_text: My app deployed on App Platform crashes on startup with an out-of-memory error. I'm using a 512MB container.
good_response_traits: Suggest upgrading container size, review app memory usage, check for memory leaks

email_text: I accidentally removed a team member who had admin access. How can I restore their permissions?
good_response_traits: Provide steps to re-invite team member, explain permission levels

email_text: How does your pricing work for bandwidth overages?
good_response_traits: Explain bandwidth pricing model, mention included bandwidth per plan

email_text: You charged me for a droplet I already destroyed last week. I want this reversed.
good_response_traits: Verify droplet destruction time, check billing cycle, process adjustment

email_text: My load balancer health checks keep failing even though my backend servers are running normally.
good_response_traits: Ask for health check config, suggest checking ports and paths, review firewall rules

email_text: I need to update my company name on the billing address for all future invoices.
good_response_traits: Explain how to update billing details, confirm if retroactive changes are possible

email_text: Do you provide any uptime SLA guarantees?
good_response_traits: State SLA percentage, link to SLA terms, explain credit process for breaches

email_text: I'm being charged for a snapshot I didn't create. I don't even know how snapshots work.
good_response_traits: Explain what snapshots are, help identify the snapshot, process deletion and adjustment

email_text: I can't pull my Docker image from your container registry. It says 'unauthorized' even though I'm logged in.
good_response_traits: Verify registry credentials, check token expiry, suggest re-authentication

email_text: I need to change the primary contact for our organization's account.
good_response_traits: Explain org management, provide steps for contact change, verify authorization

email_text: What regions are available for deploying applications?
good_response_traits: List available regions with data center locations

email_text: My automatic payment keeps failing each month and I have to manually pay. This is frustrating.
good_response_traits: Apologize, check card on file, suggest alternative payment method

email_text: The monitoring alerts I configured aren't firing even when my metrics clearly breach the thresholds.
good_response_traits: Check alert configuration, verify notification channels, review threshold settings

email_text: I locked myself out of my account after too many failed login attempts. How do I regain access?
good_response_traits: Explain account recovery process, verify identity, offer manual unlock

email_text: Is there a free tier or trial period I can use to test the platform?
good_response_traits: Describe free tier offerings, mention trial credits if available

email_text: I was billed for Reserved IP addresses that I'm not using on any active resources.
good_response_traits: Explain reserved IP billing, help release unused IPs, process credit

email_text: My Kubernetes cluster nodes keep restarting randomly. The kubelet logs show OOM kills.
good_response_traits: Review node resource limits, check pod resource requests, suggest node pool resizing

email_text: Can I add multiple email addresses to receive billing notifications?
good_response_traits: Explain notification settings, provide steps for adding billing contacts

email_text: What kind of support plans do you offer and what are the response times?
good_response_traits: Describe support tiers, response time guarantees, pricing

email_text: I'm disputing a charge from 3 months ago. My usage was zero but I was still billed for the full plan.
good_response_traits: Check usage logs for the period, review plan terms, explain proration policy

email_text: My managed Redis instance is rejecting connections with 'max clients reached' even though I haven't hit the limit.
good_response_traits: Check connection pooling, look for leaked connections, review client configuration

email_text: How do I set up SSO with my company's identity provider?
good_response_traits: Explain SSO setup process, list supported identity providers, link to docs

email_text: Can I use your CDN with a custom domain and SSL certificate?
good_response_traits: Confirm custom domain support, explain SSL certificate options
